First post

Ming

21 July 2014

log

Today, I’m learning how to build a personal website on Github. Basically, I just copy the site contents from others and then modify it. I can make something very similar to theirs but there are some underlying knowledge about the site structure, i.e. what the roles for the folders, that are not clear to me.
